title: The Deadly Tower of Monsters
notes: Game is playable, performance is pretty bad (20 to 30 FPS with terrible framepacing), DXVK hud is not showing and not writing logs so something funky with DXVK going on
Playable, but runs at 30-45 FPS whatever the graphic options are; shadows off slightly improves performance, but not comparable to running on Windows.
title: The Deadly Tower of Monsters

notes: Playable, but with bad framerates (30-40). Overral, considerably worse performance than on Windows.
title: The Deadly Tower of Monsters

notes: Runs without any tweaks or graphical/audio errors plus full controller support. Noticeable performance hit compared to Windows. It's a DX9 title and thus gains no performance benefit from DXVK/Vulkan. Rating this gold since all aspects of the game besides performance seem to be perfect. Not much that can be done besides get a more powerful video card or wait for Proton to incorporate Gallium9 or VK9.
title: The Deadly Tower of Monsters

notes: Fun game - no issues noted in my playing.
